modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: iPad Pro not powering on or booting up

full_description_text:  
My iPad Pro is not turning on. I tried to start it, but nothing happens. It seems like it’s completely dead. I’m not sure what to do next.
short_description: iPad Pro not powering on or booting up
description: My iPad Pro is not turning on. I tried to start it, but nothing happens. It seems like it’s completely dead. I’m not sure what to do next.
